com.pax.poslink

Class ReportResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse<ReportResponse>
      • com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse

  • public class ReportResponse
extends BaseResponse<ReportResponse>
    Report transaction response properties

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      AddlRspData AddlRspData
      Response AddlRspData
      java.lang.String AMEXAmount
      AmexAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String AMEXCount
      AmexCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String ApprovedAmount
      Approved amount, returned by the host, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the EDC type is LOYALTY, this field is the approved points.
      If the transaction type is not “BALANCE”, this field is mandatory.
      java.lang.String ApprovedCashBackAmount
      The cash back amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String ApprovedMerchantFee
      The surcharge fee/Merchant fee approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String ApprovedTaxAmount
      The tax amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String ApprovedTipAmount
      The tip amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String AuthCode
      Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor.
      java.lang.String AuthorizationResponse
      Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.
      AVSInformation AVSInformation
      Response AVSInformation
      java.lang.String BatchNum
      Host returns batch number.
      java.lang.String BogusAccountNum
      Bogus account number.
      CardInfo CardInfo
      Response CardInfo
      java.lang.String CardType
      Displays the card type used.
      java.lang.String CashAmount
      Cash transaction total amount.
      java.lang.String CashCount
      Cash transaction total counts.
      java.lang.String CHECKAmount
      Check transaction total amount.
      java.lang.String CHECKCount
      Check transaction total counts.
      java.lang.String ClerkID
      Employee/clerk id.
      java.lang.String CreditAmount
      Credit transaction total amount.
      java.lang.String CreditCount
      Credit transaction total counts.

      CUPAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String CUPCount
      CUPCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String CvResponse
      CVV response code.

      java.lang.String DinersCount

      java.lang.String DiscoverCount
      DiscoverCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String EBTAmount
      EBT transaction total amount.
      java.lang.String EBTCount
      EBT transaction total counts.
      java.lang.String ECRRefNum
      The ECR reference number, it is echo back from request.
      java.lang.String ECRTransID
      ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side.
      java.lang.String EDCType
      EDC type.
      java.lang.String enRouteAmount
      enRouteAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String enRouteCount
      enRouteCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

      Catch all for additional transactional information.
      See ReportResponse ExtData for definition.
      java.lang.String ExtendedAmount
      ExtendedAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String ExtendedCount
      ExtendedCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String ExtraBalance
      Balance remaining on card.

      The transaction reference number returned from a gateway directly.

      Gift transaction total amount.
      java.lang.String GiftCardType
      The gift card type.
      java.lang.String GiftCount
      Gift transaction total counts.
      java.lang.String HostAccount
      Returned by the host, last 4 digits of account number for transaction.
      java.lang.String HostCardType
      Returned by the host, the card type used in the transaction.
      java.lang.String HostCode
      Payment processing host reference number.
      java.lang.String HostDetailedMessage
      Additional detailed message or code returned from the host
      java.lang.String HostResponse
      Payment processing host response.
      java.lang.String HostTimeStamp
      Host Time Stamp.
      java.lang.String HostTraceNum
      Host returns trace number.
      java.lang.String InteracAmount
      InteracAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String InteracCount
      InteracCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String InvNum
      POS system invoice/tracking number
      java.lang.String IssuerResponseCode
      This information is stored for the integrator for receipts, additional details on a transaction decline, reporting, etc.
      java.lang.String JCBAmount
      JCBAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

      JCBCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

      Loyalty transaction total amount.

      Loyalty transaction total counts.

      java.lang.String Message
      Host returned error message.
      MOTOECommerce MOTOECommerce
      Response MOTOECommerce
      MultiMerchant MultiMerchant
      Response MultiMerchant
      java.lang.String OrigPaymentType
      The original payment type.
      java.lang.String PaymentAccountReferenceID
      The unique identifier is associated with a specific cardholder PAN.
      Non-sensitive value that can be stored/managed in place of a PAN or Token.
      Typically used for card-brand loyalty benefits.
      java.lang.String PaymentService2000
      Original Payment Service 2000
      java.lang.String PaymentType
      The payment type.
      java.lang.String RecordNumber
      The Number of the Current Record.
      java.lang.String RefNum
      Gateway reference/token number.
      java.lang.String RemainingBalance
      Balance remaining on card.
      ReportResponse.ReportEmvTag ReportEmvTag
      Response ReportEmvTag
      ReportResponse.ReportTransInfo ReportTransInfo
      Response ReportTransInfo
      java.lang.String ReportType
      If host supports various host report, this will be returned.
      Restaurant Restaurant
      Response Restaurant
      java.lang.String ResultCode
      Result code of transaction.
      java.lang.String ResultTxt
      Result Txt of transaction.
      java.lang.String RetrievalReferenceNumber
      Assigned by the host and used to track a transaction until settlement.
      java.lang.String ShiftID
      Shift id number.
      java.lang.String SinclairAmount
      SinclairAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String SinclairCount
      SinclairCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
      java.lang.String Timestamp
      Time/date stamp of transaction.
      TORResponseInfo TORResponseInfo
      Response TOR Information
      java.lang.String TotalRecord
      The total record number need reported.
      java.lang.String TransactionIdentifier
      A unique transaction identifier from bank/card brand.
      java.lang.String TransactionIntegrityClass
      Transaction Integrity Class is assigned by MasterCard for a U.S.
      java.lang.String TransactionRemainingAmount
      Any amount of the original authorization remaining after this void/refund, $$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String TransTotal
      Catch all for additional transactional total amount and count information.

    • Field Detail

      • ResultCode

        public java.lang.String ResultCode
        Result code of transaction.

        Attribute: ans6

        When code = 000000 means Approve. And other code means error.

        Used to determine results of transaction.

      • ResultTxt

        public java.lang.String ResultTxt
        Result Txt of transaction.

        Attribute: an…32

        See ResultCode & ResultTxt for definition.

      • EDCType

        public java.lang.String EDCType
        EDC type.

        could be "ALL","CREDIT", "DEBIT", "CHECK","EBT", "GIFT", "LOYALTY","CASH"

        EBT include EBT_FOODSTAMP and EBT_CASHBENEFIT

      • TotalRecord

        public java.lang.String TotalRecord
        The total record number need reported.

        Attribute: n…4

      • RecordNumber

        public java.lang.String RecordNumber
        The Number of the Current Record.

        Attribute: n…4

      • PaymentType

        public java.lang.String PaymentType
        The payment type.

        Attribute: n2

        type could be "UNKNOWN", "AUTH", "SALE", "RETURN", "VOID", "POSTAUTH", "FORCEAUTH", "CAPTURE", "REPEATSALE", "CAPTUREALL", "ADJUST", "INQUIRY", "ACTIVATE", "DEACTIVATE", "RELOAD", "VOID SALE", "VOID RETURN", "VOID AUTH", "VOID POSTAUTH", "VOID FORCEAUTH", "VOID WIDTHDRAWAL", "REVERSAL", "WIDTHDRAWAL", "ISSUE", "CASEOUT", "REPLACE", "MERGE", "REPORTLOST", "REDEEM", "STATUS_CHECK", "SETUP", "INIT", "VERIFY" "REACTIVATE" "FORCED ISSUE" "FORCED ADD" "UNLOAD" "RENEW" "TOKENIZE" "GETCONVERTDETAIL" "CONVERT" "INCREMENTALAUTH" "BALANCEWITHLOCK" "REDEMPTIONWITHUNLOCK"

        It returns strings such as "SALE".

      • OrigPaymentType

        public java.lang.String OrigPaymentType
        The original payment type.

        Attribute: n2

        type could be "UNKNOWN", "AUTH", "SALE", "RETURN", "VOID", "POSTAUTH", "FORCEAUTH", "CAPTURE", "REPEATSALE", "CAPTUREALL", "ADJUST", "INQUIRY", "ACTIVATE", "DEACTIVATE", "RELOAD", "VOID SALE", "VOID RETURN", "VOID AUTH", "VOID POSTAUTH", "VOID FORCEAUTH", "VOID WIDTHDRAWAL", "REVERSAL", "WIDTHDRAWAL", "ISSUE", "CASEOUT", "REPLACE", "MERGE", "REPORTLOST", "REDEEM", "STATUS_CHECK", "SETUP", "INIT", "VERIFY" "REACTIVATE" "FORCED ISSUE" "FORCED ADD" "UNLOAD" "RENEW" "TOKENIZE" "GETCONVERTDETAIL" "CONVERT" "INCREMENTALAUTH" "BALANCEWITHLOCK" "REDEMPTIONWITHUNLOCK"

        It returns strings such as "SALE".

      • HostTraceNum

        public java.lang.String HostTraceNum
        Host returns trace number.

        Attribute: ans…64

        Host returned trace number, if host returns it, this field is mandatory and suggest printing this on receipt.

        This usually holds the STAN or Sequence Number.

      • BatchNum

        public java.lang.String BatchNum
        Host returns batch number.

        Attribute: ans…32

        If host returns it, this field is mandatory.

      • AuthCode

        public java.lang.String AuthCode
        Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor.

        Attribute: ans…10

      • HostCode

        public java.lang.String HostCode
        Payment processing host reference number.

        Attribute: ans…32

      • HostResponse

        public java.lang.String HostResponse
        Payment processing host response.

        Attribute: ans…8

      • Message

        public java.lang.String Message
        Host returned error message. If host returns error message, this field is mandatory.

        Attribute: ans…255

      • ApprovedAmount

        public java.lang.String ApprovedAmount
        Approved amount, returned by the host, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the EDC type is LOYALTY, this field is the approved points.
        If the transaction type is not “BALANCE”, this field is mandatory.

        Attribute: n…9

        Displays the actual amount approved by the host.
        This could be different from the requested amount

      • RemainingBalance

        public java.lang.String RemainingBalance
        Balance remaining on card.

        Attribute: n…9

        Balance remaining on gift or prepaid card amount information.
        If the EDCType is EBT,it is the cash benefit account

      • ExtraBalance

        public java.lang.String ExtraBalance
        Balance remaining on card.

        Attribute: n…9

        Balance remaining on EBT card food stamp account.
        Only used while EDCType is EBT

      • BogusAccountNum

        public java.lang.String BogusAccountNum
        Bogus account number.

        Attribute: n…19

        Two conditions: 1. Displays the last 4.
        2. Display the full account number.
        It depends on terminal configuration

      • CardType

        public java.lang.String CardType
        Displays the card type used.

        Attribute: n2

        Card type determined by bin range.

      • CvResponse

        public java.lang.String CvResponse
        CVV response code.

        Attribute: ans…8

      • RefNum

        public java.lang.String RefNum
        Gateway reference/token number. Reference Number/Transaction Number 0 < Index <= 5000, normal data base. 5000 < Index <= 9000, stored data base for SAF. 9000 < Index <= 9999, failed data base for SAF.

        Attribute: ans…4

      • TransactionIdentifier

        public java.lang.String TransactionIdentifier
        A unique transaction identifier from bank/card brand.

        Attribute: ans…16

      • ECRRefNum

        public java.lang.String ECRRefNum
        The ECR reference number, it is echo back from request.

        Attribute: ans…16

      • Timestamp

        public java.lang.String Timestamp
        Time/date stamp of transaction.

        Attribute: n14

      • ClerkID

        public java.lang.String ClerkID
        Employee/clerk id.

        Attribute: ans…8

      • ShiftID

        public java.lang.String ShiftID
        Shift id number.

        Attribute: ans…8

      • ReportType

        public java.lang.String ReportType
        If host supports various host report, this will be returned.

        Attribute: ans…32

      • CreditCount

        public java.lang.String CreditCount
        Credit transaction total counts.

        Attribute: var

        Doesn't contain void and auth transaction count

      • CreditAmount

        public java.lang.String CreditAmount
        Credit transaction total amount.

        Attribute: var

        Doesn't contain void and auth transaction amount, This is net deposit amount.

      • DebitCount

        public java.lang.String DebitCount
        Debit transaction total counts.

        Attribute: var

      • DebitAmount

        public java.lang.String DebitAmount
        Debit transaction total amount.

        Attribute: var

        public java.lang.String EBTCount
        EBT transaction total counts.

        Attribute: var

        public java.lang.String EBTAmount
        EBT transaction total amount.

        Attribute: var

        public java.lang.String GiftCount
        Gift transaction total counts.

        Attribute: var

        public java.lang.String GiftAmount
        Gift transaction total amount.

        Attribute: var

        Loyalty transaction total counts.

        Attribute: var

      • LoyaltyAmount

        public java.lang.String LoyaltyAmount
        Loyalty transaction total amount.

        Attribute: var

        public java.lang.String CashCount
        Cash transaction total counts.

        Attribute: var

      • CashAmount

        public java.lang.String CashAmount
        Cash transaction total amount.

        Attribute: var

      • CHECKCount

        public java.lang.String CHECKCount
        Check transaction total counts.

        Attribute: var

      • CHECKAmount

        public java.lang.String CHECKAmount
        Check transaction total amount.

        Attribute: var

      • ExtData

        public java.lang.String ExtData
        Catch all for additional transactional information.
        See ReportResponse ExtData for definition.

        Extended data in XML format

      • TransTotal

        public java.lang.String TransTotal
        Catch all for additional transactional total amount and count information.

        Transaction total data in XML format

        Example:<CreditSaleCount>x</CreditSaleCount><CreditSaleAmount>x</CreditSaleAmount>

        TransactionTotal Detail Field
        Name Description
        CreditSaleCount Total Credit Sale Transaction Count
        CreditSaleAmount Total Credit Sale Transaction Amount
        CreditForcedCount Total Credit Force Transaction Count
        CreditForcedAmount Total Credit Return Transaction Count
        CreditReturnCount Total Credit Return Transaction Count
        CreditReturnAmount Total Credit Return Transaction Amount
        CreditAuthCount Total Credit Auth Transaction Count
        CreditAuthAmount Total Credit PostAuth Transaction Amount
        CreditPostAuthCount Total Credit PostAuth Transaction Count
        CreditPostAuthAmount Total Credit Void Transaction Amount
        CreditVoidCount Total Credit Void Transaction Count Not supported
        CreditVoidAmount Total Credit Void Transaction Amount Not supported
        DebitSaleCount Total Debit Sale Transaction Count
        DebitSaleAmount Total Debit Sale Transaction Amount
        DebitReturnCount Total Debit Return Transaction Count
        DebitReturnAmount Total Debit Return Transaction Amount
        DebitAuthCount Total Debit Auth Transaction Count
        DebitAuthAmount Total Debit Auth Transaction Amount
        DebitPostAuthCount Total Debit Post Auth Transaction Count
        DebitPostAuthAmount Total Debit Post Auth Transaction Amount
        EBTSaleCount Total EBT Sale Transaction Count
        EBTSaleAmount Total EBT Sale Transaction Amount
        EBTReturnCount EBT Return Transaction Count
        EBTReturnAmount Total EBT Return Transaction Amount
        EBTWithdrawalCount Total EBT Withdrawal Transaction Count
        EBTWithdrawalAmount Total EBT Withdrawal Transaction Amount
        EBTVoidCount Total EBT Void Transaction Count Not supported
        EBTVoidAmount Total EBT Void Transaction Amount Not supported
        EBTAuthCount Total EBT Auth Transaction Count
        EBTAuthAmount Total EBT Auth Transaction Amount
        EBTPostAuthCount Total EBT Post Auth Transaction Count
        EBTPostAuthAmount Total EBT Post Auth Transaction Amount
        GiftSaleCount Total Gift Sale/UNLOAD Transaction Count
        GiftSaleAmount Total Gift Sale/UNLOAD Transaction Amount
        GiftAuthCount Total Gift Auth Transaction Count
        GiftAuthAmount Total Gift Auth Transaction Amount
        GiftPostAuthCount Total Gift PostAuth Transaction Count
        GiftPostAuthAmount Total Gift PostAuth Transaction Amount
        GiftActivateCount Gift Activate Transaction Count
        GiftActivateAmount Total Gift Activate Transaction Amount
        GiftIssueCount Total Gift Issue Transaction Count
        GiftIssueAmount Total Gift Issue Transaction Amount
        GiftReloadCount Total Gift Reload Transaction Count
        GiftReloadAmount Total Gift Reload Transaction Amount
        GiftReturnCount Total Gift Return Transaction total Count
        GiftReturnAmount Total Gift Return Transaction Amount
        GiftForcedCount Total Gift Forced Transaction Count
        GiftForcedAmount Total Gift Forced Transaction Amount
        GiftCashoutCount Total Gift Cashout Transaction Count
        GiftCashoutAmount Total Gift Cashout Transaction Amount
        GiftDeactivateCount Total Gift Deactivate Transaction Count
        GiftDeactivateAmount Total Gift Deactivate Transaction Amount
        GiftAdjustCount Gift Adjust Transaction Count Not supported
        GiftAdjustAmount Total Gift Adjust Transaction Amount Not supported
        LoyaltyRedeemCount Loyalty Redeem Transaction Count
        LoyaltyRedeemAmount Total Loyalty Redeem Transaction Amount
        LoyaltyIssueCount Loyalty Issue Transaction Count
        LoyaltyIssueAmount Total Loyalty Issue Transaction Amount
        LoyaltyReloadCount Total Loyalty Reload Transaction Count
        LoyaltyReloadAmount Total Loyalty Reload Transaction Amount
        LoyaltyReturnCount Total Loyalty Return Transaction Count
        LoyaltyReturnAmount Total Loyalty Return Transaction Amount
        LoyaltyForcedCount Total Loyalty Forced Transaction Count
        LoyaltyForcedAmount Total Loyalty Forced Transaction Amount
        LoyaltyActivateCount Total Loyalty Activate Transaction Count
        LoyaltyActivateAmount Total Loyalty Activate Transaction Amount
        LoyaltyDectivateCount Total Loyalty Deactivate Transaction Counts
        LoyaltyDeactivateAmount Total Loyalty Deactivate Transaction Amount
        LoyaltyVoidCount Total Loyalty Void Transaction Count Not supported
        LoyaltyVoidAmount Total Loyalty Void Transaction Amount Not supported
        CashSaleCount Total Cash Sale Transaction Count
        CashSaleAmount Total Cash Sale Transaction Amount
        CashReturnCount Total Cash Return Transaction Count
        CashReturnAmount Total Cash Return Transaction Amount
        CashVoidCount Total Cash Void Transaction Count Not supported
        CashVoidAmount Total Cash Void Transaction Amount Not supported
        CheckSaleCount Total Check Sale Transaction Count
        CheckSaleAmount Total Check Sale Transaction Amount
        CheckAdjustCount Total Check Adjust Transaction Count
        CheckAdjustAmount Total Check Adjust Transaction Amount
        CheckVoidCount Total Check void Transaction Count
        CheckVoidAmount Total Check void Transaction Amount
        ForcedPreauthCount Total Forced Preauth Transaction Count
        ForcedPreauthAmount Total Forced Preauth Transaction Amount

      • CUPCount

        CUPCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

        Attribute: var

      • MaestroAmount

        public java.lang.String MaestroAmount
        MaestroAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

        Attribute: var

        public java.lang.String MaestroCount
        MaestroCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

        Attribute: var

        public java.lang.String SinclairAmount
        SinclairAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

        SinclairCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT

        Attribute: var

      • InvNum

        public java.lang.String InvNum
        POS system invoice/tracking number

        Attribute: var

      • TransactionIntegrityClass

        public java.lang.String TransactionIntegrityClass
        Transaction Integrity Class is assigned by MasterCard for a U.S. merchant in an authorization response message

        Attribute: an…10

      • HostDetailedMessage

        public java.lang.String HostDetailedMessage
        Additional detailed message or code returned from the host

        Attribute: ans...400

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • GatewayTransactionID

        public java.lang.String GatewayTransactionID
        The transaction reference number returned from a gateway directly.

        Attribute: ans...32

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • TransactionRemainingAmount

        public java.lang.String TransactionRemainingAmount
        Any amount of the original authorization remaining after this void/refund, $$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...9

        Since:
        V1.04.00

      • RetrievalReferenceNumber

        public java.lang.String RetrievalReferenceNumber
        Assigned by the host and used to track a transaction until settlement.

        Attribute: n12

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • GiftCardType

        public java.lang.String GiftCardType
        The gift card type.
        Values:
        C - Custom Value Gift Card
        P - Predetermine Value Gift Card

        Attribute: a1

        Since:
        V1.04.00

      • DebitAccountType

        public java.lang.String DebitAccountType
        The debit account Type.

        C - Checking.
        S - Saving.
        D - Default.

        Attribute: a1

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • PaymentService2000

        public java.lang.String PaymentService2000
        Original Payment Service 2000

        Data returned as part of the original authorization response from the issuer, used in follow up transactions (token/card-on-file, reversals, incremental). Format varies by card scheme.

        Attribute: ans...22

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • AuthorizationResponse

        public java.lang.String AuthorizationResponse
        Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.

        Attribute: ans...66

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • IssuerResponseCode

        public java.lang.String IssuerResponseCode
        This information is stored for the integrator for receipts, additional details on a transaction decline, reporting, etc.

        Attribute: an2

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • ECRTransID

        public java.lang.String ECRTransID
        ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side. Please check Host Specific Remarks for details about field attributes.
        This field is returned by the host.

        Attribute: ans…64

        Used only TransType is HOSTDETAILREPORT

        Since:
        V1.09.01

      • ApprovedTipAmount

        public java.lang.String ApprovedTipAmount
        The tip amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...9

        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • ApprovedCashBackAmount

        public java.lang.String ApprovedCashBackAmount
        The cash back amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...9

        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • ApprovedMerchantFee

        public java.lang.String ApprovedMerchantFee
        The surcharge fee/Merchant fee approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...9

        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • ApprovedTaxAmount

        public java.lang.String ApprovedTaxAmount
        The tax amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...9

        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • PaymentAccountReferenceID

        public java.lang.String PaymentAccountReferenceID
        The unique identifier is associated with a specific cardholder PAN.
        Non-sensitive value that can be stored/managed in place of a PAN or Token.
        Typically used for card-brand loyalty benefits.

        Attribute: ans…64

        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • HostTimeStamp

        public java.lang.String HostTimeStamp
        Host Time Stamp. Returned by the host, the date and time the transaction occurred in YYYYMMDDHHMMSS format.

        Attribute: n…14

        Since:
        V1.12.00

      • HostAccount

        public java.lang.String HostAccount
        Returned by the host, last 4 digits of account number for transaction.

        Attribute: n4

        Since:
        V1.12.00

      • HostCardType

        public java.lang.String HostCardType
        Returned by the host, the card type used in the transaction.

        Attribute: n2

        Since:
        V1.12.00
